hero.title: Every Stitch.
hero.subtitle: MG Mehta Sons manufactures the full range of garment accessories — zippers, labels, threads, buttons, laces and more — supplying garment makers across Gujarat for over four decades.

about.paragraph1: MG Mehta Sons was established in 1980 and has manufactured and supplied garment accessories to garment makers in Ahmedabad from our shop near Gheekanta Post Office ever since. We are manufacturers, which means better quality at a fair price, with no unnecessary middlemen.
about.paragraph2: Our customers range from small tailoring units to large garment factories across Gujarat. With 54+ products spanning zippers, threads, buttons, labels, laces, rivets, and tags — sourced through trusted brand partnerships with YKK, Coats, Tiago, Packard, Jordan and more — we take pride in being the one-stop shop for every accessory a production line needs.

contact.address: Nr Shantinath Pada Pole, Nr Gheekanta Post Office, Gheekanta Road, Ahmedabad – 380 001
